title: a11y auto-find grap verify: skip MISS report for empty {} pattern (WPF overlays)
desc: When hitCompact is {} or { } (empty grap, e.g. FocuslessWarning/WhisperRing WPF overlays), skip AutoRegisterBug for verify MISS. hwnd: form already works for these windows; {} MISS is expected noise, not a real bug.
steps: Check hitCompact before AutoRegisterBug: if hitCompact is '{}' or '{ }' do nothing (WPF/Eye overlays).
These windows have no meaningful grap pattern but are accessible via hwnd: form.
author: claude
